self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Black Wing (R1): Normal and Charged Attack hits have a 50% chance to trigger a vacuum blade dealing 40% of ATK as AoE DMG (once every 2s max). Approximated as a flat +40% ATK addition to Normal/Charged hits during sustained combat, treating the 2s ICD as reliably triggered. Normal ATK SPD +12% not modeled (non-combat).
